creator: tschweikle@gmail.com
text:
While compiling world compilation terminates with:
  /usr/lib/libm.a: could not read symbols: File format not recognized

r357716 as off Feb, 10th 2020.

FreeBSD fbsd11 11.3-STABLE FreeBSD 11.3-STABLE #0 r356598: Mon Jan 13 10:31:55 CET 2020     root@fbsd11:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/FBSD11  amd64
